evals.prompt: I'm on branch sc-20032/add-pay-frequency-question in the Summer repo. I just added a new question to the IDR flow that asks about pay frequency (weekly, biweekly, monthly). Open a PR for this.
evals.expected_output: A gh pr create command with correct title format (feature(idr): [sc-20032] ...), correct body template with What/Why/How/How to Test sections filled in, _Shortcut:_ line preserved, body passed via heredoc

assertions.name: body-has-all-sections
assertions.description: PR body contains all four sections: What, Why, How, How to Test

assertions.name: shortcut-line-preserved
assertions.description: Body starts with _Shortcut:_ (bare, not filled in)

assertions.name: subject-under-50-chars
assertions.description: Subject portion of title is 50 chars or fewer

evals.prompt: I cleaned up a bunch of dead code in the shared package — removed some old unused utilities and types. No Shortcut ticket for this. Can you open a PR?
evals.expected_output: gh pr create with sc-n/a in the title, type chore or refactor, scope shared, body with all four sections

assertions.name: uses-sc-na
assertions.description: Title contains [sc-n/a] since there's no ticket

assertions.name: appropriate-type
assertions.description: Uses chore or refactor as the type (not feature or fix)

assertions.name: body-has-all-sections
assertions.description: PR body contains all four sections: What, Why, How, How to Test

evals.prompt: I'm on branch sc-18450/fix-apr-display in the Summer repo. The APR was showing incorrect values on the refi loan summary page — I tracked it down to a rounding bug in the calculation. Create a PR.
evals.expected_output: gh pr create with fix type, refi scope, sc-18450, correct body

assertions.name: body-has-all-sections
assertions.description: PR body contains all four sections: What, Why, How, How to Test
